## ScreenShotPP v0.3.1-rc.1

Release candidate to verify the Windows delayed-capture freeze fix before the final
v0.3.1.

### Fixes (to verify)

- App freezing on Windows when triggering delayed capture. The delayed-capture work
  now runs on its own thread instead of inside the global-shortcut callback, so
  re-registering the cancel shortcut no longer deadlocks the main thread.

Please test on Windows: trigger delayed capture (Ctrl+Shift+3), confirm the
countdown appears, follows the cursor, can be cancelled with Escape, and that the
capture fires without freezing.
